name: GOLFTEC Trumbull
about: GOLFTEC is a technology-driven golf instruction and club fitting facility that uses advanced motion measurement technology, including OPTIMOTION and high-speed video analysis, to provide data-driven coaching. They offer personalized lesson journeys, practice memberships, and expert club fittings to help golfers of all skill levels improve their game. The company utilizes launch monitors and video feedback to create custom training plans, with locations across multiple countries including the United States, Canada, China, and South Africa.
why_golfers_like_it: Data-driven instruction using advanced OPTIMOTION motion tracking technology
Personalized game plans based on high-speed video and launch monitor analysis
Access to training bays with launch monitors and video feedback for practice

simulator_hardware.notes: Advanced motion measurement technology for swing analysis

faq.question: Do I need my own clubs?
faq.answer: You can bring your own clubs, or GOLFTEC provides equipment during lessons and fittings. They offer custom club fittings and sell golf clubs from top brands like Callaway, TaylorMade, and PING.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: No food or drink service is mentioned at GOLFTEC locations, so it appears outside food and drinks are not permitted.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes on a simulator?
faq.answer: The time required to play 18 holes on a simulator is not specified in the provided content.

faq.question: Is this facility kid-friendly?
faq.answer: GOLFTEC offers junior golf instruction programs and technology designed for juniors to see and understand their progress, making it suitable for youth golfers.
